Parameter.name: AlarmPortRedirect
Parameter.descriptions: The alarm port redirect disabled or enabled.

Parameter.name: Patlist
Parameter.descriptions: Patlist to execute.

Parameter.name: TimingsTc
Parameter.descriptions: TimingsTc for plist execution.

Parameter.name: LevelsTc
Parameter.descriptions: LevelsTc to plist execution.

Parameter.name: ApplyEndSequence
Parameter.descriptions: The ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

Parameter.name: PrePlist
Parameter.descriptions: PrePlist callback to plist execution.

Parameter.name: MaskPins
Parameter.descriptions: Comma separated pins for mask.

Parameter.name: CtvCapturePins
Parameter.descriptions: Comma separated pins for CTV capture.

Parameter.name: CtvCapturePerCycleMode
Parameter.descriptions: CTV capture mode. If DISABLED (default), CTV capture will be per pin. If ENABLED it will be per cycle.

Parameter.name: FailuresToCaptureTotal
Parameter.descriptions: Int for the number of global failures to capture. If 0 (default), it means failure capture is disabled.

Parameter.name: FailuresToCapturePerPattern
Parameter.descriptions: Int for number of failures per pattern to capture. If 0 (default), per pattern capture is disabled.

Parameter.name: MaxFailuresToItuff
Parameter.descriptions: int for the number of global failures to print to ituff. If 0 (default), it means failure prints are disabled.

Parameter.name: MaxFailuresPerPatternToItuff
Parameter.descriptions: Int for number of failures per pattern to print to ituff. If 0 (default), per pattern failure count defaults to MaxFailuresToItuff.

Parameter.name: DtsConfigurationName
Parameter.descriptions: Configuration in case DTS processing is wanted.

Parameter.name: DynamicMaskingPluginName
Parameter.descriptions: Name of the DynamicMaskingPlugin to use.

Parameter.name: DynamicMaskingPluginUserInput
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the user input to be used in DynamicMaskingPlugin.

Parameter.name: FunctionalTestPlugin
Parameter.descriptions: Name of the Frequency measure Plugin to use.

Parameter.name: FunctionalTestPluginInput
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the user input to be used in functionalPlugin.

Parameter.name: ProcessFailuresPlugin
Parameter.descriptions: The name of the plugin to process the failures from executing the PatList. Default=[Prime.Plugins.Functional.FailuresToDatalog].

Parameter.name: ProcessFailuresPluginInput
Parameter.descriptions: The user input to the ProcessFailuresPlugin.

Parameter.name: ProcessCtvPerPinPlugin
Parameter.descriptions: The name of the plugin to process CtvPerPin from executing the PatList.

Parameter.name: ProcessCtvPerPinPluginInput
Parameter.descriptions: The user input to the ProcessCtvPerPinPlugin.

Parameter.name: PatternNameCounterIndexes
Parameter.descriptions: comma separated string of integers which map characters in the pattern name to produce a scoreboard counter. Positive indexes, starting at 0, map characters at the start of the pattern name.Negative indexes, starting at -1, map characters at the end of the pattern name.

ExitPort.PortDescriptions: PORT FAIL FOR SW ERROR CONDITION
PORT FAIL FOR HW ALARM CONDITION
